jeorg-camel-app-atm/pom.xml.general_idea: Migrate JAXB API dependency from javax.xml.bind to jakarta.xml.bind namespace.
jeorg-camel-app-atm/pom.xml.why_exists: The javax.xml.bind package was removed from the JDK in Java 11 and the namespace changed to jakarta in Jakarta EE 9+.

jeorg-camel-app-atm/src/main/webapp/META.general_idea: Migrate CDI beans.xml from Spring namespace to Jakarta EE namespace to align with Jakarta EE 10+ standards required by Spring Boot 3.
jeorg-camel-app-atm/src/main/webapp/META.why_exists: Spring Boot 3 and Jakarta EE 10+ do not recognize the old Spring beans namespace for CDI configuration; using the old namespace results in deployment failures or ignored configuration.

jeorg-camel-app-atm/src/main/webapp/WEB-.general_idea: Update web.xml namespace and schema location from Java EE (javax) to Jakarta EE (jakarta) to align with Spring Boot 3.x requirements.
jeorg-camel-app-atm/src/main/webapp/WEB-.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x requires Jakarta EE 9+ namespaces; using old javax namespaces causes deployment failures or class loading errors due to missing javax.servlet classes.

jeorg-camel-app-atm/src/main/webapp/WEB-.general_idea: Upgrade web-app version attribute from 2.5 to 6.0 to match the new Jakarta EE schema.
jeorg-camel-app-atm/src/main/webapp/WEB-.why_exists: The schema version must match the namespace; mismatched version/schema can cause validation errors during deployment.

jeorg-camel-app-atm/src/test/java/com/je.general_idea: Migrate JUnit 4 test annotation import to JUnit 5.
jeorg-camel-app-atm/src/test/java/com/je.why_exists: The JUnit 4 `org.junit.Test` class is not part of the JUnit 5 API; using it with JUnit 5 runners or in a JUnit 5-only environment causes compilation errors or runtime failures.

jeorg-camel-app-atm/src/test/java/com/je.general_idea: Migrate JUnit 4 assertion import to JUnit 5.
jeorg-camel-app-atm/src/test/java/com/je.why_exists: The JUnit 4 `junit.framework.TestCase.assertEquals` is not available in JUnit 5; using it causes compilation errors.

jeorg-camel-app-atm/src/test/java/com/je.general_idea: Migrate JUnit 4 test annotation import to JUnit 5.
jeorg-camel-app-atm/src/test/java/com/je.why_exists: The JUnit 4 `org.junit.Test` class is not part of the JUnit 5 API; using it with JUnit 5 runners or in a JUnit 5-only environment causes compilation errors or runtime failures to discover/execute tests.

jeorg-camel-app-atm/src/test/java/com/je.general_idea: Migrate JUnit 4 assertion import to JUnit 5.
jeorg-camel-app-atm/src/test/java/com/je.why_exists: The `junit.framework.TestCase.assertEquals` method is from JUnit 3/4 and is not available in JUnit 5; using it causes compilation errors if the JUnit 4 dependency is removed or if strict JUnit 5 imports are enforced.

jeorg-camel-app-atm/src/test/java/com/je.general_idea: Replace JUnit 4 annotations with JUnit 5 equivalents to support the newer testing framework.
jeorg-camel-app-atm/src/test/java/com/je.why_exists: JUnit 4 annotations like @Before and @Test are not recognized by the JUnit 5 engine, causing tests to be skipped or fail to execute.

jeorg-camel-app-atm/src/test/java/com/je.general_idea: Replace JUnit 4 runner with JUnit 5 extension for Mockito integration.
jeorg-camel-app-atm/src/test/java/com/je.why_exists: The @RunWith(MockitoJUnitRunner.class) annotation is JUnit 4 specific and will cause a runtime error or be ignored in a JUnit 5 environment.

jeorg-camel-app-atm/src/test/java/com/je.general_idea: Update Mockito matchers from deprecated JUnit 4 style to JUnit 5 compatible style.
jeorg-camel-app-atm/src/test/java/com/je.why_exists: org.mockito.Matchers is deprecated and may not be available or compatible with newer Mockito versions required for JUnit 5/Spring Boot 3.

jeorg-camel-app-atm/src/test/java/com/je.general_idea: Update JUnit assertion imports from JUnit 4 to JUnit 5.
jeorg-camel-app-atm/src/test/java/com/je.why_exists: junit.framework.TestCase.assertEquals is JUnit 3/4 legacy; JUnit 5 requires org.junit.jupiter.api.Assertions.
